about.title: Driven by quality and sustainability
about.description: ALRA LED Solutions was founded in 2014 with one goal: delivering the very best LED lighting solutions for professionals. We work exclusively with top-quality products, fully certified. Our team of driven engineers is ready to find the perfect solution together with you, from idea to finished product.

values.title: Craftsmanship
values.text: Driven engineers involved in design, technology, sustainability and functionality. From sketch to certified end product.

values.title: Quality & warranty
values.text: Only CE and RoHS certified LED products. Full warranty on every product we deliver.

values.title: Personal advice
values.text: Running into a challenge in the field? We’re happy to visit and find the best solution together.

timeline.label: First in-house LED product line developed
150th technical dealer in NL and Belgium
New product range for road and construction site safety

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Running into an issue in the field? Let us know — we’re happy to visit and find a solution together.
contact.callText: Our experts are happy to help you by phone.
contact.successText: We will contact you as soon as possible.
